top.title: Trump says Iran shot down US helicopter and vows to respond
top.summary: Two crew members of the Apache helicopter that crashed following the attack were rescued by an American sea drone.

top.title: Israeli air strikes hit Lebanese city of Tyre despite Iranian warning to stop attacks
top.summary: Iran warned Israel on Monday that it could resume hostilities if attacks on its Lebanese ally Hezbollah do not stop.

top.title: Bowen: Trump and Netanyahu wanted to reshape the Middle East - now they risk a permacrisis
top.summary: The US and Israeli leaders have lost control of the consequences after miscalculating the Iran war.

top.title: Version of AI tool 'too powerful for public' released to public
top.summary: Claude Fable 5 is a version of Anthropic's Claude Mythos, an AI program which caused a stir among technology, finance, and government leaders.

top.title: Farage says Reform has contacted X 'to highest level' over fake AI ads
top.summary: The fake ads feature the governor of the Bank of England - the Bank has urged people to report them.

top.title: EU orders Meta to open WhatsApp to rival AI chatbots
top.summary: Meta has accused the EU of "regulatory overreach" and says its decision will allow tech giants like OpenAI free access to WhatsApp.

title.#text: Nintendo is playing things too safe
Fitbit’s Charge 6 and Ace LTE are now as cheap as the new $100 Air
